visible_text_regions.text: Diagnostic Engine analyzing error: 'App: koro - Antigravity - .env (VS Code-like IDE) | [GhostPoller] ERROR DETECTED: [GhostPoller] ERROR DETECTED: python_test.py 1 of 1 problem | TX ERROR: [GhostPoller] ERROR DETECTED: python_test.py 1 of 1 problem'
Al Suggests: The error message indicates a problem with the python_test.py

Fix 3 — Smarter Prompt (vision_analyzer.py): Completely rewritten to explicitly tell the LLM: 'For code errors, extract the file path and use (Get-Content) -replace to edit the file'. Temperature lowered to 0.1 for precision.
Restart python run_bot.py and test again! This time the Al should generate something like:
Ask anything, @ to mention, / for workflows

accessibility_hints: The screen features a complex UI typical of an IDE (Visual Studio Code). Key interactive areas include the file explorer, code editor, a terminal with log output, and a prominent right-side panel acting as an AI assistant/dashboard with suggested fixes and an input field for interaction. Focus may shift between code, terminal, and AI interaction panel.
